Title: Missing Crew
Crewmembers Missing
[Ship]'s Crew Missing
Search for Missing Crew
Description: The family members of the crew serving aboard a [Ship] that was recently reported as destroyed are hoping to find some closure. [Contractor] is looking for contractors to investigate [Location] and see if they can learn the crew's fate. [Timed][Danger]Your assistance in the matter is much appreciated.

Recently, a [Ship] ran into some unfortunate luck and was destroyed. Since that unfortunate incident, no one has heard or seen any of the crew since and it is our current belief that none may have survived. We are looking for contractors to complete a survey onsite at [Location] and positively identify all the missing crewmembers. [Timed][Danger]

We are in need of contractors to locate the missing crew of a [Ship] that was recently reported as destroyed. [Timed][Danger]Payment will be issued upon receiving confirmation of the full complement's whereabouts.

[Contractor] is currently seeking contractors to help confirm the status of the crew aboard a [Ship] that befell a tragic accident. We would require you to travel to [Location] and conduct an onsite search on our behalf so that we may determine what happened to the missing crew and inform the relatives. [Timed][Danger]

Not expecting a happy outcome on this one. A [Ship] was reported destroyed and now the family of the crew wants to confirm what happened one way or the other. We need contractors to search [Location], locate all the missing people, so we can give their relatives a little peace of mind. [Timed][Danger]
Danger: We would be remiss if we did not remind you that venturing into the wreck site will potentially be hazardous, and all caution should be used.
It goes without saying, but be careful out there. We would hate for whatever or whoever happened to the [Ship] to happen to you.
It's possible that the [Ship] was the victim of foul play, so make sure to take your time and don't get sloppy. Caution is the keyword.
Timed: We would all like to see this matter closed as quickly as possible, and as such, a certain amount urgency is warranted.
We've been asked to expedite matters, and are looking to settle this ASAP.
The crew has been missing for a while now and anything you could do to settle this as quickly as possible would be great.
